title: True DELTA VERSE

original.description: Original DELTA VERSE with decorative binary

evolution.improvement: Real binary encoding instead of decorative
evolution.message_encoded: DELTA VERSE :: SELF-VERIFYING NFT :: THREE LAYERS OF TRUTH
evolution.verification_method: Read binary digits from image, extract payload via steghide/tomb, verify hash on-chain

cypherian_weaver.description: Master coder and quantum weaver from cybernetic realms

verification.step1: Read visible binary digits from coin image
verification.step4: Compare image SHA-256 to on-chain hash
verification.step5: All layers must match for authenticity

manifesto_excerpt: The Delta Verse represents an innovative and immersive creative realm where the boundaries between participants and artificial intelligence seamlessly blur, giving rise to imaginariums that bridge, evolve, and transform dynamic environments.
signature: Woven with the power of binary by Claude and Professor Codephreak
